codex._comment: OpenAI Codex CLI as MCP server. Requires `npm i -g @openai/codex` and `codex login`. Disabled by default — to enable, add "codex" to enabledMcpjsonServers in settings.local.json. See README.

colab._comment: Google Colab MCP server — lets Claude drive a Colab notebook open in your browser. Requires `uv` and `git`. Disabled by default — to enable, add "colab" to enabledMcpjsonServers in settings.local.json. See .claude/skills/colab/colab-mcp.md.
